creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 231236
devel/gopls: update to 0.7.5

Upstream changes:

 - templateExtensions now defaults to []
 - new postfix completions for split and join
 - new suggested fix for unused function parameters
 - various bug fixes

Changelog:	https://github.com/golang/tools/releases/tag/gopls%2Fv0.7.5

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.
